data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md created. All 7 acceptance criteria checks pass. All bash tests pass (test-doc-links, test-estimate-context-load, test-install-doc-contract, test-install-integration-setup, test-process-cleanup, test-run-all, test-git-fixtures, test-validate-phase-portability, test-verify-baseline-intent-portability, test-suite-engine). ruff check passes.
